forecast-period.text: Mostly clear. Light winds.

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Mostly clear. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Becoming cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h shifting south to southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. The chance of morning frost near the eastern border. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly during the morning then turning southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Mostly clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly in the middle of the day then tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
Sun protection 10:10am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the evening. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
